_meta.description: Event studies of major oil shocks → political transmission. Used to calibrate the elasticities in TRANSMISSION_ELASTICITIES (config.py). Not auto-updated — these are one-time historical anchors.
_meta.compiler_note: Numbers are from EIA, BLS, BEA, Gallup historical archives. Where I'm hedging on a specific number I've added a 'confidence' field. Verify against original sources before quoting in formal analysis.

events.label: 1980 伊朗革命 + 两伊战争
events.context: 1979 年 1 月伊朗革命使伊朗原油产量从 600 万桶/日骤降至约 100 万桶/日。1980 年 9 月两伊战争爆发，再有 400 万桶/日产能离市。叠加 1979-1981 美伊人质危机，波斯湾持续地缘风险溢价。
events.context_en: The January 1979 Iranian Revolution cut Iranian crude output from 6 mb/d to ~1 mb/d. The Iran-Iraq war beginning September 1980 took another 4 mb/d offline at peak. Combined with the 1979-1981 US-Iran hostage crisis, this created sustained Persian Gulf risk premium.

political_outcome.fair_model_predicted: Carter loss (correct direction; precise number unverified)
political_outcome.rally_effect_observed: Brief +18pp rally on Iran hostage crisis Nov 1979, fully decayed by April 1980 Desert One failure

events.lessons_for_hormuz: 当下霍尔木兹危机最直接的历史类比。波斯湾供应危机 + 美伊直接对抗 + 18+ 个月持续高油价 → 执政党选举溃败。卡特败选主因是通胀（P 项）而非增长（G 项）。对 2028：若霍尔木兹中断持续 12+ 个月，共和党执政党面临同一风险通道。重要提醒：卡特同时遭遇党内初选挑战（肯尼迪），Fair 模型无法捕捉这一项；纯经济效应估计约为 -3 到 -5pp，并非整个 489-49 选举人团差距。
events.lessons_for_hormuz_en: The most direct historical analogue to the current Hormuz crisis. Persian Gulf supply crisis + direct US-Iran confrontation + 18+ months of sustained high oil prices → catastrophic incumbent party defeat. Carter's loss was driven primarily by inflation (P term) more than growth (G term). For 2028: if Hormuz disruption persists 12+ months, the Republican incumbent party faces the same risk channel. Important caveat: Carter also faced a primary challenge (Kennedy) which the Fair model doesn't capture; pure economic effect was probably -3 to -5pp, not the full 489-49 EC margin.

events.label: 1990-91 海湾战争（伊拉克入侵科威特 → 沙漠风暴）
events.label_en: 1990-91 Gulf War (Iraqi Invasion of Kuwait → Desert Storm)
events.context: 1990 年 8 月 2 日伊拉克入侵科威特，400 万桶/日产能瞬间离市。1991 年 1-2 月沙漠风暴行动结束危机。短促、剧烈的供应冲击。
events.context_en: On August 2, 1990, Iraq invaded Kuwait — 4 mb/d production left the market instantly. Operation Desert Storm in January-February 1991 ended the crisis. A short, sharp supply shock.

political_outcome.outcome: Bush 41 loses to Clinton (despite military victory)
political_outcome.rally_effect_observed: +24pp rally on Desert Storm Jan-Mar 1991, fully decayed by mid-1992

events.lessons_for_hormuz: (1) 即使短促油价冲击也会通过消费者信心通道留下持续 18+ 个月的政治后效，价格回落后政治影响仍未结束。(2) 军事胜利无法庇护执政党——老布什从 89% 支持率 18 个月内跌至 34%。(3) Fair 模型最著名失败案例——高增长、温和通胀，模型预测轻松获胜，但选民'衰退'感知压过了硬数据。对 2028 直接相关：'数据 vs 感知'背离是模型的最大盲点。
events.lessons_for_hormuz_en: (1) Even brief oil shocks leave political effects lasting 18+ months through the consumer sentiment channel — political impact does not end when prices fall back. (2) Military victory does not shield incumbents — Bush 41 fell from 89% approval to 34% in 18 months. (3) Fair model's most famous failure — high growth, mild inflation, model predicted easy win, but voter 'recession' perception overrode hard data. Direct relevance for 2028: the 'data vs perception' divergence is the model's biggest blind spot.

events.label: 2008 油价峰值（$147）
events.context: 由中国和新兴市场增长推动的持续需求驱动型油价上涨，叠加投机因素。非地缘政治驱动，但传导机制有启示价值。期间次贷危机酝酿中。
events.context_en: Sustained demand-driven oil price rise (China + emerging market growth) compounded by speculation. Not geopolitically driven, but the transmission mechanism is instructive. Subprime crisis was brewing simultaneously.
events.lessons_for_hormuz: 和平年代最大的油价冲击 + 金融危机 = 执政党在开放席位（McCain 接棒）情况下仍输 7+ pp。验证了传导弹性链：$60→$147（+145%）→ 汽油 $2.34→$4.11（+76%）→ CPI +3.6pp → ICS -41 点。对 2028 霍尔木兹情景 C/D，量级相当。混淆因素：2008 年 9 月雷曼危机的影响掩盖了油价冲击的纯效应。
events.lessons_for_hormuz_en: Largest peacetime oil shock + financial crisis = incumbent party loses 7+ pp despite an open seat (McCain). Verifies the transmission elasticity chain: $60→$147 (+145%) → gas $2.34→$4.11 (+76%) → CPI +3.6pp → ICS -41 pts. Comparable in magnitude to 2028 Hormuz scenarios C/D. Confounder: September 2008 Lehman crisis obscured the pure oil shock effect.
confidence_medium: isolating oil from financial crisis effects

events.label: 2022 俄乌战争油价冲击
events.context: 2022 年 2 月 24 日俄罗斯入侵乌克兰 → 对俄油制裁 → 布伦特油价飙升。当时新冠疫情后通胀已达 7%+，使油价冲击的政治杀伤力倍增。
events.context_en: Russia invaded Ukraine on February 24, 2022 → sanctions on Russian oil → Brent surged. Inflation was already at 7%+ after COVID, multiplying the political damage of the oil shock.

political_outcome.midterm_explanation: Dobbs decision (Jun 2022) mobilized Dem turnout; oil/inflation hit was real but offset
political_outcome.rally_effect_observed: Minor +3pp on Ukraine support, decayed in 8 weeks

elasticities_implied.comment: 2022 transmission was DAMPENED on the headline because gasoline and CPI were already high; perception adapted slowly. But the 2024 hangover effect was severe (cumulative price level memory).

events.lessons_for_hormuz: (1) 现代信息环境下：油价冲击到选民感知的传导比 1980/1990 更慢，但持续时间更长。(2) 累积价格水平比峰值通胀率更重要（Stantcheva 2024）。(3) 非经济议题（Dobbs 堕胎判决）的反向动员可抵消纯经济效应——对 2026，堕胎/IVF 议题可能起类似作用。(4) 2024 结果证明：即使 18 个月前的油价冲击也会通过'累积通胀记忆'渗透到下个选举周期。
events.lessons_for_hormuz_en: (1) In the modern information environment, oil-shock-to-voter-perception transmission is slower than 1980/1990 but more durable. (2) Cumulative price level matters more than peak inflation rate (Stantcheva 2024). (3) Non-economic issues (Dobbs abortion ruling) can offset pure economic effects via counter-mobilization — abortion/IVF could play a similar role in 2026. (4) The 2024 result proves that even 18-month-old oil shocks bleed into the next election cycle via 'cumulative inflation' memory.
confidence_medium: isolating Dobbs effect from economic effect

calibration_summary.implied_total_oil_to_vote_elasticity: A 50% sustained oil shock → ~22pp gasoline rise → ~0.8pp CPI YoY rise → ~-3 ICS pts → ~-0.3pp approval → ~-0.06pp vote share. Direct mechanical effect is SMALL. The bigger transmission is via the Z (good news quarters) channel and via media salience effects that compound over months.
calibration_summary.warning: These median elasticities mask significant variance. 1990 Gulf War showed oil shock → outsized political effect (Bush 41 collapse). 2022 Ukraine showed muted immediate political effect but large 18-month-lagged effect (Biden 2024 problem). The 'when the shock happens' matters as much as 'how big the shock is'.
